name: Oatmeal Cake and Frosting
recipeInstructions:
Frosting: Mix 3/4 cup brown sugar, butter, cream, and coconut. Spread over the cake after baking and broil until bubbling.
Cake: Mix oatmeal and boiling water and set aside. Mix remaining ingredients and add to oatmeal. Bake in a 9-inch X 13-inch pan at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes.
